title: SecuraTron Inbox Ticket
description: A ticket submitted to the Stagecraft inbox for dispatch. This schema is the authoritative definition for all inbox tickets. Any changes require a Charter revision per HR-INBOX-6.

ticket_id.description: Unique ticket identifier. Format: TICK-<8 uppercase hex chars>. Generated by the producer at submission time.

source.description: Origin of the ticket. 'mesh' is reserved for future MESH-TRANSPORT-CHARTER integration.

priority.description: Ticket priority. Determines queue routing and watcher behavior. 'urgent' → inbox.urgent, 'high' → inbox, 'low' → inbox.batch, 'normal' → inbox (default).

status.description: Ticket lifecycle status. Transitions: pending → processing → completed|failed|quarantined. Transitions are irreversible.

human_gate.description: If true, the dispatch must halt for operator approval before proceeding. Automatically set to true when 'destructive' is true.

destructive.description: If true, the ticket contains destructive or privileged actions (data deletion, config modification, network disruption, privilege escalation). Implies human_gate=true.

skill.description: Skill ID to dispatch to. Dotted path convention: module.subskill. Examples: 'web.nikto', 'recon.gobuster', 'system.info'. Must map to a molecule in dispatch.py.

target.description: Target for the skill. Format depends on the skill. Examples: 'scanme.nmap.org' (host), '/path/to/file' (file), 'config.yaml' (config).

inputs.description: Skill-specific input parameters. Arbitrary key-value pairs passed to the molecule. The molecule is responsible for validating its own inputs.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of ticket creation. Must be the current time at producer submission.

result.description: Filled in by the molecule after dispatch. Not required at submission. Contains the outcome of the dispatch.

output.description: Raw output from the molecule execution.

ledger_offset.description: Byte offset in the source JSONL where the result was written. Filled by watcher on successful dispatch.

auth.description: Ticket authentication object. Reserved for future CA96 cryptographic verification. Currently optional and unused.

algorithm.description: Authentication algorithm identifier. Reserved for CA96.

allOf.description: Constraint: destructive=true implies human_gate=true. If destructive is true but human_gate is false, the ticket is invalid.
